title: AI Memory: Three Threats Looming Over Micron, SK Hynix, and Samsung
description: Artificial intelligence promises a revolution, but it now relies on a strained link in the supply chain: memory chips. Hyperscalers are currently rushing to secure volumes, but prices are skyrocketing...
content: Prices for DRAM, ubiquitous in modern electronics, already surged by 98% in the first quarter of 2026 and could climb another 58% to 63% this quarter, according to TrendForce. Such a pace is clearly unsustainable for corporate clients, which mechanic... [1578 chars]

title: How a Niche Technology Became a Choke Point for A.I.
description: Advanced chip packaging, which boosts computing power for artificial intelligence, has made the United States more reliant on Taiwan than ever.
content:
Subramanian Iyer, an electrical engineer and educator, has long specialized in a sleepy niche of the semiconductor industry that has now become a major choke point in the global contest for artificial intelligence leadership.

title: Peppa Pig backlash as US company Hasbro requires child actors to sign voices over to AI
description: US entertainment giant Hasbro is reportedly asking child actors on the popular series Peppa Pig to sign over their voices to artificial intelligence under new contract terms. An open letter signed by 1,000 industry professionals condemns the AI contract clause and warns of matters of consent.
content:
American toy conglomerate Hasbro is reportedly embracing the use of AI on the popular British animated children's show Peppa Pig, and concerns have been expressed over one particular contractual stipulation.
